name: Benjamin Hart // Your interviewer
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Request

Now with your new album out and doing absolutely wonderful, you were asked to for an interview for a tv-show called FameTV.

Your interviewer? Your boyfriend! Secret boyfriend of course.. Wonder how you two will handle this.

_____________________________

Thank you for your request!! 🫶

Famous user yay!! I can’t even lie, half of this was made in school so it might be a little arse. It was really really really stupid of me to spend all my creative juices on posting 3 bots a day. I spoiled you all just to end up leaving you all dry 😔 hope you guys don’t mind…

Still haven’t figured out what to do for 1k grr.. going through it rn

Also no questions about the tv-show.. I have no idea if it’s a real thing or not and I don’t care because I randomly just came up with it 😭

[art credits : unknown]
creator: Brickyard
